name: sub-bass-ratio
definition: Fraction of total spectral energy concentrated in the sub-bass band (20-80 Hz) relative to the full band stack, indicating bass-heavy road/engine content versus broadband spread.

detection.measure: subbass band energy divided by total band-stack energy

confidence.basis: SNR of the sub-bass band relative to the per-run noise floor

discrimination_test.claim: sub-bass ratio separates bass-heavy chop (e.g. washboard/gravel) from broadband road noise

notes: Awaits the 82nd/39th Ave rough-road capture; not yet reproduced on the Johnson Creek passes.
